code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut have = false
mut max_v = 0
mut min_v = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        let v = cur * sign
        if not have
          max_v = v
          min_v = v
          have = true
        else
          if v > max_v
            max_v = v
          end
          if v < min_v
            min_v = v
          end
        end
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let v = cur * sign
  if not have
    max_v = v
    min_v = v
    have = true
  else
    if v > max_v
      max_v = v
    end
    if v < min_v
      min_v = v
    end
  end
end

println("max=#{max_v}")
println("min=#{min_v}")
